name: HeroBillboardTestimonial
description: Billboard-layout hero section with centered text content above full-width image/video with rotating testimonial overlay.

description.example: Create stunning, responsive websites with our comprehensive component library

testimonialRotationInterval.note: Interval in milliseconds between testimonial rotations

imageSrc.note: Supports external URLs with unoptimized prop

videoSrc.note: Takes precedence over imageSrc if both provided

imageAlt.note: Empty string marks image as decorative (aria-hidden)

structure.href: string - Link destination (optional). External URLs (https://, http://, www.) open in new tab. Internal values (e.g., 'about', 'contact') scroll to #about, #contact sections
structure.props: Partial<ButtonPropsForVariant> - Additional button props like className, textClassName (optional)

buttonRules.note: Button variant is controlled by ThemeProvider's defaultButtonVariant. Border radius is controlled by ThemeProvider's borderRadius (options: 'sharp', 'rounded', 'soft', 'pill'). All sections should be wrapped in a single ThemeProvider at the app/page level to maintain consistent styling across the entire site.

propsSchema.title: string
propsSchema.testimonials: Array<{ name: string, handle: string, testimonial: string, rating: number, imageSrc?: string, imageAlt?: string }>
propsSchema.buttons?: Array<{text: string, onClick?: () => void, href?: string}>
propsSchema.avatars?: Avatar[] - Array of avatar objects with src and alt properties
propsSchema.avatarText?: string - Text displayed next to the avatar group

usageExample:
<ThemeProvider defaultButtonVariant="icon-arrow" defaultTextAnimation="entrance-slide" borderRadius="pill" background="aurora" cardStyle="glass-elevated" primaryButtonStyle="gradient" secondaryButtonStyle="glass">
  <HeroBillboardTestimonial 
    title="Build Modern Web Experiences" 
    description="Create stunning, responsive websites with our comprehensive component library" 
    background={{ variant: 'glowing-orb' }}
    tag="New Release"
    tagIcon={Sparkles}
    imageSrc="/hero.jpg"
    imageAlt="Product showcase"
    mediaAnimation="slide-up"
    buttons={[{ text: 'Get Started', href: 'https://example.com' }, { text: 'Learn More', href: 'about' }]}
    buttonAnimation="blur-reveal"
    testimonials={[
      { name: 'Sarah Johnson', handle: 'CEO, TechCorp', testimonial: 'This transformed our workflow!', rating: 5, imageSrc: '/avatar.jpg' },
      { name: 'Michael Chen', handle: 'CTO, StartupXYZ', testimonial: 'Best investment we made.', rating: 5, imageSrc: '/avatar2.jpg' }
    ]}
  />
</ThemeProvider>
do: Use for landing pages with social proof
Use for product showcases with testimonials
Use when customer reviews add credibility
Use when centered layout is preferred over split
